name: Mattermost Onboarding Plugin
description: Automatically sends onboarding guidance to newly created Mattermost users.

settings_schema.header: Configure onboarding templates, links, exclusions, and delivery behavior.
settings_schema.footer: Changes are applied to newly created users immediately after saving.

settings.help_text: Rendered as a custom admin console operations panel.
Start onboarding delivery when UserHasBeenCreated fires.
Bot username used to send onboarding DMs.
Visible sender name for onboarding direct messages.
Language used when a user-specific template match is not found.
Department template code used when no mapping is found.
Queue a delayed send when user attributes may not be ready immediately.
Minutes between retry attempts for failed automatic sends.
Maximum retry attempts for failed automatic sends.
Array of templates using template_id, template_type, dept_code, lang, title, body, active_yn, and version.
Array of links using link_id, template_id, link_title, link_desc, link_url, sort_order, and active_yn.
Array of mappings using source_dept_code, source_dept_name, template_dept_code, template_dept_name, organization_name, and active_yn.
Array of rules using email_domain, username, user_id, group_name, group_id, is_bot, or deleted rule types.
